title: Zybit
tag: Founding now · live in 3 dental practices
blurb: Voice AI that charts for dentists. Zybit listens while you work and writes your findings into Open Dental: on the right tooth, in your own codes, exactly as you said them. No retyping, no miscoding. Live in 3 practices and onboarding more by hand.

title: RWA Analyzer
blurb: Agent-first backing-verification for tokenized real-world assets, exposed over MCP, CLI, and HTTP. Checks whether a token's real-world backing actually holds up instead of rubber-stamping it.

title: Kite Credit
blurb: A persistent, cross-border credit score that fuses off-chain and on-chain identity. Pulls Solana activity, GitHub history, and ZK-verified bank statements (Reclaim Protocol) into one dynamic score, with plain-English explanations from Gemini 2.0 Flash.

title: ComputeSwarm
blurb: A decentralized GPU compute marketplace that matches idle GPUs with demand through trustless micropayments. x402 USDC settlement on Base, Docker-sandboxed execution, PyTorch and HuggingFace job templates, built to undercut cloud by using idle capacity.

title: CommitMint
blurb: A Solana commitment-pool platform for accountability and habit-building. Anchor smart contracts let users stake into pools and track progress toward goals with on-chain verification. Built the commitment-escrow contracts and backend.

title: GraphRAG Dodd-Frank
blurb: A research project applying Microsoft's GraphRAG to the 800-page Dodd-Frank Act. Extracts entities and relationships into a knowledge graph, then does hybrid graph plus vector retrieval to answer regulatory questions a flat vector store misses.

title: Texas Hold'em (OCaml)
blurb: Networked multiplayer Texas Hold'em, built from scratch in OCaml. A TCP server hosts a 2 to 6 player table, and each player runs a terminal client with ASCII-rendered cards, backed by a real hand evaluator and an interactive rulebook. CS 3110 team project.
